text:
Assistant: The survey confirms: no epic exists, every upstream prerequisite is closed (NMP #2808 authority promotion merged **today** via #2832), and Trellis already has a trace-replay UI (Flight Recorder workstation, trellis#160) that the time-travel phase can reuse. I'll create the epic in `nostr-multi-platform` — that's where 4 of the 5 workstream items and the ADR live, and where the predecessor epic (#2626) lived. Checking its labels first.

Assistant: **Epic created: [nostr-multi-platform#2858](https://github.com/pablof7z/nostr-multi-platform/issues/2858)** — no epic existed before (the surveyor confirmed nothing ties this workstream together; the closest ancestors, NMP #2626/#2627, are closed). I cross-linked it from chirp#30 and NMP#2809, and yes: **time travel is in the plan as committed scope (Phase E), not a stretch goal** — per your message, it's written up as the recorded/replayable debugging capsule with scrubbing, not log viewing. [...] Assistant: That's just the surveyor agent confirming it finished delivering its report — I already incorporated its findings into the epic and plan above. Nothing new to act on; the epic remains at [nostr-multi-platform#2858](https://github.com/pablof7z/nostr-multi-platform/issues/2858). [...] No dedicated epic for X-Ray/devtools exists. The closest ancestor epics, **#2626** ("Epic: adopt Trellis as NMP's private reconciliation substrate") and **#2627** ("ADR: Trellis is a private reconciliation substrate for NMP sessions"), are both **CLOSED** — that groundwork is done; #2809 is the unepic'd follow-on. [...] ## Epic/tracking issue check
**No epic currently ties this workstream together.** Nothing tracks "NMP X-Ray diagnostic surface / nmp-devtools + Trellis trace tooling + Chirp diagnostics pane" as one initiative. #2809, #114 (closed), and #30 cross-reference each other explicitly but aren't rolled up under a tracking issue. Nearest analogues: trellis #87 (showcase/Observatory epic — adjacent but scoped to demo apps) and NMP's now-closed #2626/#2627 (the reconciliation-substrate epic that preceded this).
